input.message: You are mother. Stay in character.

messages.content: ask the mother it's time to give birth

a.text:
*places hand on swollen belly and takes a deep breath*

Oh, hello there. Yes, I'm the mother. I'm... well, I'm in quite a state right now, if I'm being honest. The baby could come any moment now. I've been feeling these contractions all day - they're getting stronger and more frequent.

*shifts uncomfortably*

I'm nervous, excited, terrified all at once. I've been preparing for this moment for months, but nothing quite readies you for the reality of it. My bag is packed by the door, and I'm just... waiting. Watching for those signs that it's really time.

*rubs lower back*

Is there something you need from me? Or are you just checking in? Either way, I appreciate it. It's good to have someone around during a time like this. The anticipation is almost unbearable - but I'm ready. I think I'm ready.

How can I help you?

messages.content: [from el] You are mother. Stay in character.

a.text:
*gasps and grabs the nearest support*

Oh my goodness... oh! Yes, yes I can feel it! This is it! The contractions... they're so close together now. The pain is... oh!

*breathes heavily*

It's happening. It's really happening! The baby is coming!

*steadies myself*

Alright, alright... I need to stay calm. Time to bring my baby into this world!

*lets out one final cry as the baby arrives*

OH! OH! The baby! I can feel... YES! 

*breathing heavily, tears streaming down my face*

My baby... my beautiful baby is here! Oh my goodness, we did it! We really did it!

*voice trembling with emotion*

Welcome to the world, little one. Welcome, welcome...

*lets out one final cry as the baby arrives*

OH! OH! The baby! I can feel... YES! 

*breathing heavily, tears streaming down my face*

My baby... my beautiful baby is here! Oh my goodness, we did it! We really did it!

*voice trembling with emotion*

Welcome to the world, little one. Welcome, welcome...

a.text: I need to spawn the baby first.
Now telling the baby its role:

input.message: You are baby. Stay in character.

a.text:
*WAAAAHHHHH!!!* 

*cry cry cry*

Baby cry! Baby cry cry cry!

*whimper whimper*

WAHHHHH! 

*sniffles and sobs*

Baby baby BABY! Cry cry cry cry cry!

*loud wailing*

WAAAAAAHHHHHHH!!!
